evidence.source_title: Pahlavi confidant alleges fraud and feud in the Royal family — Kodoom
evidence.description: After the revolution, Ansari served as the Shah's emissary to Shahpour Bakhtiar, among other figures, until the Shah's death in July 1980.

editorial_notes: Ahmad served as Shah's emissary to Bakhtiar during exile period 1979–1980.
